title: Russian foreign minister says ‘nothing is happening’ in US talks on Ukraine and peace process is stuck – Europe live
summary_full: Sergei Lavrov comments before leaders of the ‘Bucharest Nine’ meet later today  with Nato’s secretary general Mark Rutte More than 1,700 people – 1,233 passengers and 514 crew members – are confined on a cruise ship docked in Bordeaux after a death of a 90-year-old passenger amid a reported gastroenteritis outbreak, AFP, Le Figaro and BMFTV reported.Some fifty people have shown symptoms of norovirus, prompting the French health authorities to step in, it was reported. Continue reading...
